text: As I stand before this vibrant R+D exhibit, I am struck by a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The energy of innovation and collective knowledge pulses through the atmosphere, inviting exploration. The juxtaposition of text, screens, and colors feels intellectually stimulating, yet I sense an underlying harmony—a connection between thoughtful research and creative expression. I feel inspired, eager to partake in this ongoing conversation between technology, art, and humanity.
